final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial travel photography, hero image for resort marketing
Primary request: tropical resort infinity pool overlooking the ocean with lounge chairs, umbrellas, and palm trees under blue sky
Scene/backdrop: luxury beachfront resort, infinity pool edge blending into ocean horizon, white sand beach visible below
Subject: turquoise infinity pool with crystal clear water, white cushioned lounge chairs, large canvas beach umbrellas, tall coconut palm trees swaying gently
Style/medium: high-saturation travel photography, resort lifestyle editorial
Composition/framing: wide panoramic view from poolside perspective, 24mm lens, leading lines from pool edge to horizon
Lighting/mood: bright midday tropical sun, vibrant and inviting vacation atmosphere
Color palette: saturated turquoise water + deep ocean blue + crisp white + lush palm green + golden sand tones + bright sky blue
Materials/textures: glossy water surface with subtle ripples, woven rattan umbrella textures, smooth pool tiles, matte lounge cushions
Constraints: maintain high color saturation throughout, keep ocean horizon visible beyond pool edge
Avoid: muted colors, overcast sky, empty pool, cluttered composition, artificial lighting
